user.title: BirdWeather Setup
user.description: Pick a nearby public BirdWeather station, or type a name to search. Found {count} station(s). You can also paste a station ID directly.

data_description.search: Leave the station empty and submit to search by name instead of by location.
data_description.station_id: Choose a station, or paste its numeric station ID.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the BirdWeather API. Please try again.
error.invalid_station: No public station was found with that ID.
error.no_selection: Choose a station from the list, paste a station ID, or enter a search term.

abort.already_configured: This BirdWeather station is already configured

init.title: BirdWeather options
init.description: Tune the “notable species” ranking and the unusual-visitor alert.

data_description.notable_rarity_weight: 100% = pure rarity; 0% = pure recency. Default 70% leans toward rarity with a small recency nudge.
data_description.absence_days: How long a known species must have gone unheard before it counts as an unusual visitor. Default 30 days.
